summary.key_theme: 公司完成 4 拆 1 股票分割並受惠於 AI 需求強勁，但近期股價漲幅過大引發獲利了結賣壓與估值修正疑慮。

bullish.title: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Sees 5x AIDR Demand As Identity Push Broadens Its Platform
bullish.reason: AI 偵測與回應 (AIDR) 需求成長 5 倍，顯示公司在 AI 資安領域的技術護城河與市場滲透率持續擴大。

bullish.title: Grant Thornton Picks CrowdStrike (CRWD) to Power Its Global Cybersecurity Platform
bullish.reason: 獲得大型機構 Grant Thornton 採用，驗證了其全球資安平台的企業級競爭力與成長潛力。

bullish.title: UBS Maintains Buy on CrowdStrike Holdings, Raises Price Target to $235
bullish.reason: 瑞銀 (UBS) 分析師 Roger Boyd 上調目標價，反映市場對其長期成長動能的信心。

bullish.title: How Investors Are Reacting To CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD) Doubling Down On AI Security And Stock Split
bullish.reason: 彙整了 AI 產品擴張與股票分割的雙重利多，強化市場對公司長期策略的正面預期。

bearish.title: CrowdStrike: Valuation Reaching Speculative Levels, Despite AI Tailwinds (Downgrade)
bearish.reason: 分析師指出今年以來股價漲幅已達 70%，估值過高且利多已反映在股價中，因此下調評級。

bearish.title: What's Going on With CrowdStrike Stock Friday? — CrowdStrike (CRWD) stock dipped 6% on Friday as investors took profits.
bearish.reason: 短期股價急漲後出現獲利了結賣壓，導致單日下跌 6%，顯示市場情緒轉趨謹慎。

bearish.title: Needham Maintains Buy on CrowdStrike Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $235
bearish.reason: 儘管維持買入評級，但下調目標價反映了對短期市場波動或估值模型的調整。

bearish.title: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on CrowdStrike Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $172
bearish.reason: 摩根士丹利分析師 Keith Weiss 下調目標價，顯示對短期股價表現的保守看法。

neutral.title: CrowdStrike Just Completed a Stock Split. Is the Stock a Buy Now?
neutral.reason: 股票分割為中性財務事件，不影響公司基本面，僅調整股價與流通股數。

neutral.title: Stifel Maintains Buy on CrowdStrike Holdings, Adjusts Price Target To $220
neutral.reason: 目標價調整純粹是為了反映 4 拆 1 的股票分割比例，並非基本面變動。
